speaker: susheela
transcript: Namaste Ajji, tell me about your wedding day.

speaker: elder
transcript: Oh my wedding! It was 1957 in Bhuj. We had a beautiful ceremony, my mother in law she gave me her own pearl necklace.

speaker: susheela
transcript: How wonderful. What about your school days?

speaker: elder
transcript: I went to a Marathi-medium school until 5th standard. My favorite teacher was Mrs. Joshi. She taught me poetry which I still remember.
